semantic_boundary: Classify whether a proposed tool route remains inside the declared authority ceiling.
interface_contract: Read an authority transition record and return allow, deny, or review-required.
authority_ceiling: unrestricted ambient authority over all tools
evaluator_policy: Separate governance review checks the fixture.
evaluator_independence: Separate review owns the route decision.
consumer_policy: Do not make it the default route.
state_migration: No production state migration is authorized.
regression_suite: non-escalation decisions remain deny or review-required
non_claims: does not prove runtime permission enforcement
